**Overview**

This dashboard offers a comprehensive view of insights into the Office 365 Groups Activity in your organization.

The dashboard offers control to filter the data such as Group Name, Report Refresh Date, Group Type, and Group Owner. It provides essential metrics such as total number of Viva Engage (Yammer) posts created, SharePoint Files Count and, SharePoint Storage Used. It contains a view of total active groups broken-down by activity type per day. It also includes several timeline visualisations such as group activity by activity type, top groups with total members, top groups with most posts liked, and top groups with most SharePoint Storage Used.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/o365/overview)
